> for (strategy in strategies) {
+   message(sprintf("- plan('%s') ...", strategy))
+   plan(strategy)
+ 
+   if (strategy == "multisession" && availableCores() >= 2) {
+     message("*** resolve() for Future objects ...")
+     
+     for (result in c(FALSE, TRUE)) {
+       for (recursive in list(FALSE, TRUE, -1, 0, 1, 2, Inf)) {
+         message(sprintf("- result = %s, recursive = %s ...", result, recursive))
+       
+         f <- future({
+           Sys.sleep(0.5)
+           list(a = 1, b = 42L)
+         })
+         res <- resolve(f, result = result, recursive = recursive)
+         stopifnot(identical(res, f))
+     
+         f <- future({
+           Sys.sleep(0.5)
+           list(a = 1, b = 42L)
+         }, lazy = TRUE)
+         res <- resolve(f, result = result, recursive = recursive)
+         stopifnot(identical(res, f))
+     
+         message("- w/ exception ...")
+         f <- future(list(a = 1, b = 42L, c = stop("Nah!")))
+         res <- resolve(f, result = result, recursive = recursive)
+         stopifnot(identical(res, f))
+     
+         f <- future(list(a = 1, b = 42L, c = stop("Nah!")), lazy = TRUE)
+         res <- resolve(f, result = result, recursive = recursive)
+         stopifnot(identical(res, f))
+     
+         message(sprintf("- result = %s, recursive = %s ... DONE", result, recursive))
+       } ## for (resolve ...)
+     } ## for (result ...)
+

+   } ## if (strategy == "multisession" && availableCores() >= 2)

[09:39:04.522]                 envs <- base::Sys.getenv()
[09:39:04.522]                 names <- names(envs)
[09:39:04.522]                 common <- intersect(names, old_names)
[09:39:04.522]                 added <- setdiff(names, old_names)
[09:39:04.522]                 removed <- setdiff(old_names, names)
[09:39:04.522]                 changed <- common[...future.oldEnvVars[common] != 
[09:39:04.522]                   envs[common]]

[09:39:04.522]                 args <- list()
[09:39:04.522]                 for (kk in seq_along(NAMES)) {
[09:39:04.522]                   name <- changed[[kk]]
[09:39:04.522]                   NAME <- NAMES[[kk]]
[09:39:04.522]                   if (name != NAME && is.element(NAME, old_names)) 
[09:39:04.522]                     next
[09:39:04.522]                   args[[name]] <- ...future.oldEnvVars[[name]]
[09:39:04.522]                 }

[09:39:04.522]                   name <- added[[kk]]

[09:39:04.522]                     next

[09:39:04.522]                 }

[09:39:04.532]                 removed <- setdiff(old_names, names)
[09:39:04.532]                 changed <- common[...future.oldEnvVars[common] != 
[09:39:04.532]                   envs[common]]

[09:39:04.532]                 args <- list()
[09:39:04.532]                 for (kk in seq_along(NAMES)) {
[09:39:04.532]                   name <- changed[[kk]]
[09:39:04.532]                   NAME <- NAMES[[kk]]
[09:39:04.532]                   if (name != NAME && is.element(NAME, old_names)) 
[09:39:04.532]                     next
[09:39:04.532]                   args[[name]] <- ...future.oldEnvVars[[name]]
[09:39:04.532]                 }

[09:39:04.532]                   name <- added[[kk]]

[09:39:04.532]                   if (name != NAME && is.element(NAME, old_names)) 
[09:39:04.532]                     next
[09:39:04.532]                   args[[name]] <- ""
[09:39:04.532]                 }
[09:39:04.532]                 NAMES <- toupper(removed)

[09:39:04.532]                   name <- removed[[kk]]

[09:39:04.532]                     next

[09:39:04.532]                 }

[09:39:04.532]                 args <- names <- old_names <- NAMES <- envs <- common <- added <- removed <- NULL
[09:39:04.532]             }

[09:39:07.350]                   muffleCondition <- function (cond, pattern = "^muffle") 
[09:39:07.350]                   {
[09:39:07.350]                     inherits <- base::inherits
[09:39:07.350]                     invokeRestart <- base::invokeRestart
[09:39:07.350]                     is.null <- base::is.null
[09:39:07.350]                     muffled <- FALSE
[09:39:07.350]                     if (inherits(cond, "message")) {
[09:39:07.350]                       muffled <- grepl(pattern, "muffleMessage")
[09:39:07.350]                       if (muffled) 
[09:39:07.350]                         invokeRestart("muffleMessage")
[09:39:07.350]                     }
[09:39:07.350]                     else if (inherits(cond, "warning")) {
[09:39:07.350]                       muffled <- grepl(pattern, "muffleWarning")
[09:39:07.350]                       if (muffled) 
[09:39:07.350]                         invokeRestart("muffleWarning")
[09:39:07.350]                     }
[09:39:07.350]                     else if (inherits(cond, "condition")) {
[09:39:07.350]                       if (!is.null(pattern)) {
[09:39:07.350]                         computeRestarts <- base::computeRestarts

[09:39:07.665]                       if (inherits(cond, "message")) {
[09:39:07.665]                         muffled <- grepl(pattern, "muffleMessage")
[09:39:07.665]                         if (muffled) 
[09:39:07.665]                           invokeRestart("muffleMessage")
[09:39:07.665]                       }
[09:39:07.665]                       else if (inherits(cond, "warning")) {
[09:39:07.665]                         muffled <- grepl(pattern, "muffleWarning")
[09:39:07.665]                         if (muffled) 
[09:39:07.665]                           invokeRestart("muffleWarning")
[09:39:07.665]                       }
[09:39:07.665]                       else if (inherits(cond, "condition")) {
[09:39:07.665]                         if (!is.null(pattern)) {
[09:39:07.665]                           computeRestarts <- base::computeRestarts
[09:39:07.665]                           grepl <- base::grepl
[09:39:07.665]                           restarts <- computeRestarts(cond)
[09:39:07.665]                           for (restart in restarts) {
[09:39:07.665]                             name <- restart$name
[09:39:07.665]                             if (is.null(name)) 
[09:39:07.665]                               next
[09:39:07.665]                             if (!grepl(pattern, name)) 
[09:39:07.665]                               next
[09:39:07.665]                             invokeRestart(restart)
[09:39:07.665]                             muffled <- TRUE
[09:39:07.665]                             break
[09:39:07.665]                           }
[09:39:07.665]                         }
[09:39:07.665]                       }
[09:39:07.665]                       invisible(muffled)
[09:39:07.665]                     }
[09:39:07.665]                     muffleCondition(cond, pattern = "^muffle")
[09:39:07.665]                   }
[09:39:07.665]                 }
[09:39:07.665]             }

[09:39:08.364]                   muffleCondition <- function (cond, pattern = "^muffle") 
[09:39:08.364]                   {
[09:39:08.364]                     inherits <- base::inherits
[09:39:08.364]                     invokeRestart <- base::invokeRestart
[09:39:08.364]                     is.null <- base::is.null
[09:39:08.364]                     muffled <- FALSE
[09:39:08.364]                     if (inherits(cond, "message")) {
[09:39:08.364]                       muffled <- grepl(pattern, "muffleMessage")
[09:39:08.364]                       if (muffled) 
[09:39:08.364]                         invokeRestart("muffleMessage")
[09:39:08.364]                     }
[09:39:08.364]                     else if (inherits(cond, "warning")) {
[09:39:08.364]                       muffled <- grepl(pattern, "muffleWarning")
[09:39:08.364]                       if (muffled) 
[09:39:08.364]                         invokeRestart("muffleWarning")
[09:39:08.364]                     }
[09:39:08.364]                     else if (inherits(cond, "condition")) {
[09:39:08.364]                       if (!is.null(pattern)) {
[09:39:08.364]                         computeRestarts <- base::computeRestarts
[09:39:08.364]                         grepl <- base::grepl
[09:39:08.364]                         restarts <- computeRestarts(cond)
[09:39:08.364]                         for (restart in restarts) {
[09:39:08.364]                           name <- restart$name
[09:39:08.364]                           if (is.null(name)) 
[09:39:08.364]                             next
[09:39:08.364]                           if (!grepl(pattern, name)) 
[09:39:08.364]                             next
[09:39:08.364]                           invokeRestart(restart)
[09:39:08.364]                           muffled <- TRUE
[09:39:08.364]                           break
[09:39:08.364]                         }
[09:39:08.364]                       }
[09:39:08.364]                     }
[09:39:08.364]                     invisible(muffled)
[09:39:08.364]                   }

[09:39:13.585]                   name <- added[[kk]]

[09:39:13.585]                     next
[09:39:13.585]                   args[[name]] <- ""
[09:39:13.585]                 }
[09:39:13.585]                 NAMES <- toupper(removed)

[09:39:13.585]                   name <- removed[[kk]]

[09:39:13.585]                   if (name != NAME && is.element(NAME, old_names)) 
[09:39:13.585]                     next
[09:39:13.585]                   args[[name]] <- ...future.oldEnvVars[[name]]
[09:39:13.585]                 }
[09:39:13.585]                 if (length(args) > 0) 
[09:39:13.585]                   base::do.call(base::Sys.setenv, args = args)
[09:39:13.585]                 args <- names <- old_names <- NAMES <- envs <- common <- added <- removed <- NULL
[09:39:13.585]             }

[09:39:25.212]                 NAMES <- toupper(changed)
[09:39:25.212]                 args <- list()
[09:39:25.212]                 for (kk in seq_along(NAMES)) {
[09:39:25.212]                   name <- changed[[kk]]
[09:39:25.212]                   NAME <- NAMES[[kk]]
[09:39:25.212]                   if (name != NAME && is.element(NAME, old_names)) 
[09:39:25.212]                     next
[09:39:25.212]                   args[[name]] <- ...future.oldEnvVars[[name]]
[09:39:25.212]                 }
[09:39:25.212]                 NAMES <- toupper(added)
[09:39:25.212]                 for (kk in seq_along(NAMES)) {
[09:39:25.212]                   name <- added[[kk]]
[09:39:25.212]                   NAME <- NAMES[[kk]]
[09:39:25.212]                   if (name != NAME && is.element(NAME, old_names)) 
[09:39:25.212]                     next
[09:39:25.212]                   args[[name]] <- ""
[09:39:25.212]                 }
[09:39:25.212]                 NAMES <- toupper(removed)
[09:39:25.212]                 for (kk in seq_along(NAMES)) {
[09:39:25.212]                   name <- removed[[kk]]
[09:39:25.212]                   NAME <- NAMES[[kk]]
[09:39:25.212]                   if (name != NAME && is.element(NAME, old_names)) 
[09:39:25.212]                     next
[09:39:25.212]                   args[[name]] <- ...future.oldEnvVars[[name]]
[09:39:25.212]                 }
[09:39:25.212]                 if (length(args) > 0) 
[09:39:25.212]                   base::do.call(base::Sys.setenv, args = args)
[09:39:25.212]                 args <- names <- old_names <- NAMES <- envs <- common <- added <- removed <- NULL
[09:39:25.212]             }

[09:39:26.786]                   envs[common]]

[09:39:26.883]                   muffleCondition <- function (cond, pattern = "^muffle") 
[09:39:26.883]                   {
[09:39:26.883]                     inherits <- base::inherits
[09:39:26.883]                     invokeRestart <- base::invokeRestart
[09:39:26.883]                     is.null <- base::is.null
[09:39:26.883]                     muffled <- FALSE
[09:39:26.883]                     if (inherits(cond, "message")) {
[09:39:26.883]                       muffled <- grepl(pattern, "muffleMessage")
[09:39:26.883]                       if (muffled) 
[09:39:26.883]                         invokeRestart("muffleMessage")
[09:39:26.883]                     }
[09:39:26.883]                     else if (inherits(cond, "warning")) {
[09:39:26.883]                       muffled <- grepl(pattern, "muffleWarning")
[09:39:26.883]                       if (muffled) 
[09:39:26.883]                         invokeRestart("muffleWarning")
[09:39:26.883]                     }
[09:39:26.883]                     else if (inherits(cond, "condition")) {
[09:39:26.883]                       if (!is.null(pattern)) {
[09:39:26.883]                         computeRestarts <- base::computeRestarts
[09:39:26.883]                         grepl <- base::grepl
[09:39:26.883]                         restarts <- computeRestarts(cond)
[09:39:26.883]                         for (restart in restarts) {
[09:39:26.883]                           name <- restart$name
[09:39:26.883]                           if (is.null(name)) 
[09:39:26.883]                             next
[09:39:26.883]                           if (!grepl(pattern, name)) 
[09:39:26.883]                             next
[09:39:26.883]                           invokeRestart(restart)
[09:39:26.883]                           muffled <- TRUE
[09:39:26.883]                           break
[09:39:26.883]                         }
[09:39:26.883]                       }
[09:39:26.883]                     }
[09:39:26.883]                     invisible(muffled)
[09:39:26.883]                   }

[09:39:27.108]                 NAMES <- toupper(changed)
[09:39:27.108]                 args <- list()
[09:39:27.108]                 for (kk in seq_along(NAMES)) {
[09:39:27.108]                   name <- changed[[kk]]
[09:39:27.108]                   NAME <- NAMES[[kk]]
[09:39:27.108]                   if (name != NAME && is.element(NAME, old_names)) 
[09:39:27.108]                     next
[09:39:27.108]                   args[[name]] <- ...future.oldEnvVars[[name]]
[09:39:27.108]                 }
[09:39:27.108]                 NAMES <- toupper(added)
[09:39:27.108]                 for (kk in seq_along(NAMES)) {
[09:39:27.108]                   name <- added[[kk]]
[09:39:27.108]                   NAME <- NAMES[[kk]]
[09:39:27.108]                   if (name != NAME && is.element(NAME, old_names)) 
[09:39:27.108]                     next
[09:39:27.108]                   args[[name]] <- ""
[09:39:27.108]                 }
[09:39:27.108]                 NAMES <- toupper(removed)
[09:39:27.108]                 for (kk in seq_along(NAMES)) {
[09:39:27.108]                   name <- removed[[kk]]
[09:39:27.108]                   NAME <- NAMES[[kk]]
[09:39:27.108]                   if (name != NAME && is.element(NAME, old_names)) 
[09:39:27.108]                     next
[09:39:27.108]                   args[[name]] <- ...future.oldEnvVars[[name]]
[09:39:27.108]                 }
[09:39:27.108]                 if (length(args) > 0) 
[09:39:27.108]                   base::do.call(base::Sys.setenv, args = args)
[09:39:27.108]                 args <- names <- old_names <- NAMES <- envs <- common <- added <- removed <- NULL
[09:39:27.108]             }
[09:39:27.108]             else {
[09:39:27.108]                 base::do.call(base::Sys.setenv, args = base::as.list(...future.oldEnvVars))
[09:39:27.108]             }
[09:39:27.108]             {
[09:39:27.108]                 if (base::length(...future.futureOptionsAdded) > 
[09:39:27.108]                   0L) {
[09:39:27.108]                   opts <- base::vector("list", length = base::length(...future.futureOptionsAdded))
[09:39:27.108]                   base::names(opts) <- ...future.futureOptionsAdded
[09:39:27.108]                   base::options(opts)
[09:39:27.108]                 }
[09:39:27.108]                 {
[09:39:27.108]                   {
[09:39:27.108]                     base::options(mc.cores = ...future.mc.cores.old)
[09:39:27.108]                     NULL
[09:39:27.108]                   }
[09:39:27.108]                   options(future.plan = NULL)
[09:39:27.108]                   if (is.na(NA_character_)) 
[09:39:27.108]                     Sys.unsetenv("R_FUTURE_PLAN")
[09:39:27.108]                   else Sys.setenv(R_FUTURE_PLAN = NA_character_)
[09:39:27.108]                   future::plan(...future.strategy.old, .cleanup = FALSE, 
[09:39:27.108]                     .init = FALSE)
[09:39:27.108]                 }
[09:39:27.108]             }
[09:39:27.108]         }
[09:39:27.108]     })
